phase3_findings.description: _accumulate_tokens double-counts tokens: sums per-message usage AND the result-summary cumulative usage
extract-execution-cost.py double-counts every token figure when the file carries a result-summary usage alongside per-message usage (observed array shape)
run-id targeting behavioral test does not fail RED under a glob-broaden regression (matching record sorts first)
reader breadcrumb-specificity asserted only for the scalar arm; missing-file/garbage/wrong-type arms untested

fix_decisions.claim_text: _verify_pr/_resolve_pr_for_issue conflate not-a-PR with gh-lookup-failed and swallow gh stderr
fix_decisions.evidence: Suggestion severity; safe failure direction (skeleton skipped, no corruption); named-breadcrumb contract met

fix_decisions.claim_text: 'see the reader's breadcrumb above' misdirects when python3/reader absent
fix_decisions.evidence: Suggestion severity; one-line reword; safe failure direction

fix_decisions.claim_text: modelUsage->model_usage mapping unverified by any reader fixture
fix_decisions.evidence: Suggestion severity; simple dict passthrough, first-object-wins

fix_decisions.claim_text: bare-jq fallback via ${DEVFLOW_JQ:-jq} rather than sourcing resolve-jq.sh
fix_decisions.evidence: Suggestion severity; documented in-line; pins pass; relies on efficiency-trace.sh sourcing (which sets DEVFLOW_JQ)

stale_prose_check: producer/helper invocation denied by the local classifier (piped helper); fix delta is Python + shell-test code with no counted-prose claims; CI #434 stale-prose self-scan over committed HEAD is the backstop

skipped_checks.reason: working tree dirty at run time (grades committed HEAD); runs clean on CI post-commit
